name: Feature request
about: An idea for the guardian
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""

---

**Problem it's solving**
A short paragraph on the pain point.

**Proposed behaviour**
What should happen, ideally with a `config.yaml` snippet that shows how the
user would opt in.

**Trade-offs**
Anything the maintainer should consider (privacy, cost, dep-license,
rate-limit, OS-support).

**Plan reference**
If this lands inside an existing build plan (`BUILD-PLAN.md §...`), drop the
section number here.
